title: Gas Mileage Calculator - Calculate MPG & Fuel Efficiency
description: Free gas mileage calculator. Calculate miles per gallon (MPG), fuel cost per mile, and trip fuel costs based on distance and fuel used.
keywords: gas mileage calculator, MPG calculator, fuel efficiency, miles per gallon, fuel cost calculator
intro: Calculate your vehicle's fuel efficiency (MPG or L/100km). Enter distance traveled and fuel used to find your gas mileage and cost per mile.

faq.a: MPG = Miles Driven / Gallons Used. Example: 300 miles on 10 gallons = 30 MPG. Fill up, reset trip meter, fill up again and divide.
Average new car gets about 25-30 MPG. Hybrids get 40-60 MPG. EVs equivalent is 100+ MPGe. Trucks/SUVs average 20-25 MPG.
